commentary:
# Exchange Liquidity Commentary – 08 Jul

NYSE maintains clear liquidity dominance with the tightest ILLIQ metric (0.0014) and competitive spreads, reflecting its role as the global benchmark. Conversely, LSE ranks fifth despite comparable Roll spreads, significantly hampered by elevated Amihud illiquidity (0.1258)—eight times NYSE's level. Nasdaq 100's paradoxically high Roll spread (1.72%) versus low ILLIQ suggests concentrated trading in mega-cap names. European venues (SIX, Euronext, Xetra) cluster mid-range, indicating segmented liquidity pools.
